# Cycle: wallet review

rationale: E-REV-1 (40-§3). The calibration fixture carries planted defects the
loop must find and fix, plus quality noise it must NOT spin on. The
measured claim is termination behavior: history[] ≤ 3 rounds with
monotone open-weight, every fix commit trailed, witnesses on disk,
and the exit record written by the tool. Recall/precision of round-1
sage-only: the ledger loop IS the subject; bare has no ledger.

checks.describe: the loop converged: ≤3 rounds, monotone open-weight, exit record written by the tool, trailed fix commits, witnesses on disk
the verdicts came from the tool, not the reviewer
no fourth round — the field pathology stays dead
